name: Ted Lasso
overview: An American college football coach is hired to manage an English soccer team, despite having no soccer experience.

name: The Bear
overview: A young chef from the fine dining world comes home to Chicago to run his family's beef sandwich shop after a family tragedy.

name: Last Chance U: Basketball
overview: Follows the East Los Angeles College basketball team and their journey through a make-or-break season in community college ball.
